scope: S4096 DeepSeek-V4 sparse-MLA backward lower-level HIP/CK/rocWMMA cooperative-kernel gate

active_latency_gates_ms.producer_target_read: The producer target is capped at 4 ms because the materialized dQ+dKV floor is already close to the 11.13 ms boundary. A slower source producer cannot materialize an e2e gain even if the dKV epilogue is clever.

derived_budget_ms.read: Once P/scaled-dP are materialized, dQ+dKV is about 7.97 ms. The next source-boundary kernel can only spend about 3.16 ms on score/prob/scaled-dP recompute and bridge overhead before it misses the retained 11.13 ms boundary.

rejected_scaffolds.name: current_rocwmma_selected_tile_score_page
rejected_scaffolds.reason: The score/contribution producer is already slower than the full sparse-attention backward gate, so dKV epilogue work on this scaffold cannot be promoted.

rejected_scaffolds.name: naive_same_cta_pair_reduced_ck_epilogue
rejected_scaffolds.reason: It reduces modeled writes but serializes too much leader scan work. Keep CK direct-fragment math, reject this epilogue.

rejected_scaffolds.name: query_headblock_ck_producer_only
rejected_scaffolds.reason: The one-token/H16/selected64 CK source-boundary producer is 29 ms before dQ or dKV writes. It is a buildable lower-level surface, but it is not the cooperative producer schedule we need.

rejected_scaffolds.name: ordinary_headsplit_h16_h32
rejected_scaffolds.reason: Head splitting fits ordinary workgroups but emits multiple independent dKV pages. Useful H64 reductions need a persistent or multi-stage cooperative producer-consumer design.

active_kernel_contract.name: query_major_persistent_or_cooperative_mfma_sparse_mla_backward_v1
active_kernel_contract.first_surface_to_code: A new HIP/CK source-boundary producer, not another patch on source_boundary_score_page_rocwmma_d512.hip.

implementation_order.purpose: Prove the query-major source recompute schedule is fast before adding dQ or dKV writes.
Use the known-fast CK direct-fragment dKV slice first; do not spend more time on local dKV reduction until the source producer itself is under budget.

implementation_order.gate: Beat raw-atomic dKV without a leader-scan cliff
implementation_order.purpose: Only after the source-boundary kernel beats the full boundary, add a segmented/compact dKV epilogue that does O(1) slot lookup or warp/block segmented reduction.

non_goals_for_next_iteration: MORI shared-memory workaround for attention score pages

promotion_rule.single_gpu: Do not call this a sparse-attention candidate until the S4096 source-boundary dQ+dKV latency is below 11.13 ms.
promotion_rule.multi_gpu_e2e: Do not run 4x/8x TFLOPs materialization for this path until the single-GPU sparse-attention boundary improves.
